evals.name: audit_project
evals.prompt: Check if my macOS app at ~/Projects/MyApp is ready for App Store submission
assertions: Response should describe generating an HTML report

evals.name: privacy_manifest_check
evals.prompt: My app was rejected because of PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy issues. Help me fix it.
assertions: Response should explain privacy manifest requirements
Response should mention required API reason codes
